honest_issues: Hyperparameters were chosen and evaluated on the same four internal cards. This is scoped eval-only evidence, not independent promotion proof; preview_band=true and VERIFIED=0 remain binding.
The four internal clips were consumed only as banked immutable artifacts. No label file was read, created, or consumed; no training or GPU/BODY rerun occurred.

Img1605 and Outdoor frozen-window fused-vs-TRK medians are slightly farther from TRK than baseline because plant stationarity opposes per-frame anchor jitter. The fused trajectory remains close to BODY and does not raw-average sources.
The wide suite's real exit code is 1 despite all 11 failures being evidenced as sandbox-known or pre-existing work outside this lane; focused Track I tests and scaffold registration are green.

pb.vision 11-minute demo remains out of scope because no pipeline/BODY artifacts exist and a GPU BODY run would be required. A follow-up needs a scheduled GPU run producing calibration, tracks, skeleton3d, SAM3D keypoints, and skeleton-direct phases before this CPU refiner can be evaluated.
No process_video.py, orchestrator.py, best_stack.json, root markdown, iOS, web, label, or other lane-owned file was edited. Wiring and default-selection deltas below are proposals only.

The accepted-phase producer changed exact window boundaries and removed one short candidate in Burlington and Outdoor, although all counts remain within the required band. The anti-gaming frozen windows preserve the comparison independently of those changes.
next:
What the fusion does, plainly: for each player it keeps SAM-3D-Body's root-relative pose intact and moves the entire skeleton by one small rigid court-frame correction per frame. High-confidence TRK footpoints and BODY placement resist drift, accepted planted-foot windows softly resist slide, and a robust Huber loss prevents one wrong observation from taking over. Corrections are bounded, covariance and per-term weights are emitted, and the floor term only nudges Z without ever snapping a sole or ankle to zero.

- 2026-07-16 manager ledger: Track I placement fusion scoped PASS on four internal eval-only cards; Arm A 4/4 <=0.030 m, Arm B max+median 4/4 improved, phase/reprojection/no-snap/sensitivity/determinism gates pass; preview only, VERIFIED=0; wiring/default proposals pending Track C/owner.

```diff
@@ imports
+from threed.racketsport.placement_trajectory_refine import PlacementTrajectoryConfig, refine_placement_trajectory, sha256_file
@@ stage definitions
     PipelineStageDefinition("grounding_refine", 140, 140),
+    PipelineStageDefinition("placement_trajectory_refine", 145, 145),
@@ dependencies
+    "placement_trajectory_refine": ("tracking", "body", "grounding_refine"),
@@ ordered post-BODY spine
     "grounding_refine",
+    "placement_trajectory_refine",
@@ expected artifacts
+    "placement_trajectory_refine": ("placement_trajectory_refined.json",),
@@ PipelineOptions
+    placement_trajectory_refine: bool = False
@@ after _stage_grounding_refine
+    def _stage_placement_trajectory_refine(self) -> StageOutcome:
+        if not self.options.placement_trajectory_refine:
+            return StageOutcome(stage="placement_trajectory_refine", status="skipped", wall_seconds=0.0, notes=["optional preview stage disabled"])
+        required = [self.clip_dir / name for name in ("skeleton3d.json", "tracks.json", "foot_contact_phases.json")]
+        missing = [path.name for path in required if not path.is_file()]
+        if missing:
+            return StageOutcome(stage="placement_trajectory_refine", status="blocked", wall_seconds=0.0, notes=[f"missing required inputs: {', '.join(missing)}"])
+        refined = refine_placement_trajectory(_read_json(required[0]), tracks_payload=_read_json(required[1]), foot_contact_phases=_read_json(required[2]), config=PlacementTrajectoryConfig())
+        refined["placement_trajectory_refinement"]["provenance"] = {"inputs": {path.name: {"path": str(path.resolve()), "sha256": sha256_file(path)} for path in required}, "code_version": "trackI_placefuse_20260716_schema_v1", "coordinate_space": "court_Z0", "preview_band": True, "VERIFIED": 0}
+        _write_json(self.clip_dir / "placement_trajectory_refined.json", refined)
+        return StageOutcome(stage="placement_trajectory_refine", status="ran", wall_seconds=0.0, artifacts=["placement_trajectory_refined.json"], notes=["separate preview artifact; raw skeleton3d/tracks/phases unchanged"])
@@ CLI parser / options construction
+    parser.add_argument("--placement-trajectory-refine", action="store_true", help="Emit preview plant-aware placement trajectory after grounding_refine.")
+    placement_trajectory_refine=args.placement_trajectory_refine,
```
